background: A filling station is supplied with gasoline once a week. Its weekly volume of sales in thousands of gallons is a random variable with probability density function $$f(x)= \begin{cases}5(1-x)^4 & 0<x<1 \\ 0 & \text { otherwise }\end{cases}$$.

task.query: What need the capacity of the tank be so that the probability of the supplies being completely used up in a given week is no more than 0.01?
task.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量

task.query: What is the expected volume of sales in a given week? Show your work.

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
